gt_sql: SELECT T1.type, SUM(T3.cost) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget WHERE T1.event_name = 'October Meeting'
pred_sql:
SELECT 
    T2.category AS type, 
    SUM(T3.cost) AS "SUM(T3.cost)"
FROM event AS T1
JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget
WHERE T1.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND T3.approved = 'true'
GROUP BY T2.category
question: Identify the type of expenses and their total value approved for 'October Meeting' event.
